title: Add standalone RPL message parse/generate vectors
description:
RPL DIO/DAO/DAO-ACK are currently only tested via SCHC compression vectors (schc_compression.json rules 3-4). Need standalone JSON test vectors in test/vectors/rpl_messages.json for:
- DIO base message encode/decode (24 bytes)
- DAO base message encode/decode (20 bytes with DODAGID)
- DAO-ACK encode/decode
- RPL options: DODAG Config, RPL Target, Transit Info
- Option iteration

The Rust lichen-rpl crate and Python prototype have unit tests but no shared cross-implementation vectors. This blocks parity verification.
